recommendations.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
recommendations.overview: An elite Navy SEAL uncovers an international conspiracy while seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife.

recommendations.title: American Made
recommendations.overview: The true story of pilot Barry Seal, who transported contraband for the CIA and the Medellin cartel in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
recommendations.overview: After the death of his girlfriend's daughter from a drug overdose, Paul Kersey takes on the local drug cartel.

recommendations.title: Boogie
recommendations.overview: Hoping to make some money, Boogie, a violent and ruthless assassin, kidnaps a witness a mafia boss wants dead.

recommendations.title: Enemies Closer
recommendations.overview: After a major shipment of drugs goes missing on the US-Canadian border, forest ranger and former Navy SEAL Henry is plunged into survival mode when the drug cartel forces him to help retrieve the downed package. Trapped in the wilderness with no comm

recommendations.title: Heli
recommendations.overview: Heli must try and protect his young family when his 12-year-old sister inadvertently involves them in the brutal drug world. He must battle against the drug cartel that have been angered as well as the corrupt police force.

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: Philippe Jordan is a policeman prone to advancing the cause of justice by any means necessary. On his agenda is a powerful drug cartel working out of Paris and Marseilles, with a drug lord who is essentially inaccessible -- but not immortal.

recommendations.title: Rage
recommendations.overview: When the Russian mob kidnaps the daughter of a reformed criminal, he rounds up his old crew and seeks his own brand of justice.

recommendations.title: Warhorse One
recommendations.overview: A gunned down Navy SEAL Master Chief must guide a child to safety through a gauntlet of hostile Taliban insurgents and survive the brutal Afghanistan wilderness.

recommendations.title: Speed Kills
recommendations.overview: Speedboat racing champion and multimillionaire Ben Aronoff leads a double life that lands him in trouble with the law and drug lords.
